Package com.adobe.aem.guides.wknd.it.tests

Class HtmlUnitClient

java.lang.Object
org.apache.sling.testing.clients.AbstractSlingClient
org.apache.sling.testing.clients.SlingClient
com.adobe.cq.testing.client.CQClient
com.adobe.aem.guides.wknd.it.tests.HtmlUnitClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, org.apache.http.client.HttpClient
public class HtmlUnitClient extends com.adobe.cq.testing.client.CQClient
AEM client that maintains a WebClient instance from HTMLUnit framework

  • Method Details

    • getResourceRefs

      public List<URI> getResourceRefs(String path) throws IOException, URISyntaxException
      Extracts references to external resources used by the specified page. This method extracts references from script, img, meta and link tags.
      Parameters:
      path - path to the page.
      Returns:
      list of URIs resolved against the pages baseURL
      Throws:
      IOException - when IO error occurs
      URISyntaxException - if malformed URL reference is found.

    • getPage

      public com.gargoylesoftware.htmlunit.html.HtmlPage getPage(String path, boolean javaScriptEnabled) throws IOException
      Loads html page specified by path.
      Parameters:
      path - path to the page
      javaScriptEnabled - whether to execute javascript
      Returns:
      parsed page.
      Throws:
      IOException - if IO error occurs.

      Throws:
